scripts.build: echo 'No compilation step needed for Python'
scripts.dev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); let cmd = 'python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; if (fs.existsSync('venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe')) { cmd = 'venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; } else if (fs.existsSync('venv/bin/uvicorn')) { cmd = 'venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; } try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, PYTHONIOENCODING: 'utf-8', PYTHONUTF8: '1' } }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev:local: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); let cmd = 'python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; if (fs.existsSync('venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe')) { cmd = 'venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; } else if (fs.existsSync('venv/bin/uvicorn')) { cmd = 'venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'; } try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, PYTHONIOENCODING: 'utf-8', PYTHONUTF8: '1' } }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
